comments.author: @maintainer
comments.body: This will throw a TypeError if `user` is null — we've seen this hit prod twice in the last quarter. Add a guard before reading user.id.

comments.author: @security-bot
comments.body: Caching the plaintext password in `this._cache` is a security finding (CWE-312, cleartext storage of sensitive information). Don't store the password at all — and the comparison on line 36 should use a constant-time hashing check anyway. This is blocking.

comments.author: @nitpicker
comments.body: Could use template literals here instead of string concatenation — cleaner.

comments.author: @codestyle-guru
comments.body: `let line` should be `const line` — it's never reassigned. Same with `let order` on line 39.

comments.author: @principal-engineer
comments.body: I think `OrderService` should be a separate microservice with its own data store. The monolith is starting to creak. This PR feels like a step in the wrong direction architecturally.

comments.author: @curious-reviewer
comments.body: Why are you computing `total` here instead of using the existing `PricingEngine.computeOrderTotal()` from `lib/pricing.js`? Wasn't sure if that was intentional.

comments.author: @product-manager
comments.body: While you're in here, can you also add the admin order-cancellation dashboard? It's been on the backlog for months and would be great to get done.
